title: Jurassic Dragons
description: Play with Dinosaurs, and dragons with one modpack with massive mountains and volcanos!
body: Kill dragon get sronger gear, and get eggs by killing big ones under ground. hatch the eggs and watch them day by day growing up to be bigger then your house! Find fossils and make machine to bring dinosaurs back to life! with other mods such as biomes o plenty, aquaculture 2, iron jetpacks, sophisticated backpacks, security craft, serene seasons, storage drawers, twilight forest, xaero's minimap+world map, first person model, falling trees, and naturalist.
